qa_pairs.question: What modules are required to run GROMACS version `2024.4` with CPU-only execution under the `StdEnv/2023` environment?
qa_pairs.answer: To run GROMACS version `2024.4` on CPUs within the `StdEnv/2023` environment, you need to load the following modules: `StdEnv/2023 gcc/12.3 openmpi/4.1.5 gromacs/2024.4`.

qa_pairs.question: How do I load the necessary modules to enable GPU (CUDA) acceleration for GROMACS `2024.4` using `StdEnv/2023`?
qa_pairs.answer: To enable GPU (CUDA) acceleration for GROMACS `2024.4` within the `StdEnv/2023` environment, you must load `StdEnv/2023 gcc/12.3 openmpi/4.1.5 cuda/12.2 gromacs/2024.4`.

qa_pairs.question: Which compilers and libraries are utilized for GROMACS versions `2024.4` and `2024.1` when configured with `StdEnv/2023`?
qa_pairs.answer: GROMACS versions `2024.4` and `2024.1` configured with `StdEnv/2023` utilize GCC, FlexiBLAS, and FFTW.
